ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the review */,
  "bold" TEXT /* Whether any part of the review is bold */,
  "star_num" INTEGER /* Star rating given by the user */,
  "helpful_num" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "reply_content" TEXT /* Content of the reply to the review */,
  "useful" TEXT /* Whether the review is marked as useful */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the issue in the review has been resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., app store, web form) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, developer, support) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_types" (
  "feedback_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the feedback type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feedback type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_feedback" (
  "review_feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review feedback entry */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "feedback_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_feedback_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_feedback_feedback_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_type_id") REFERENCES feedback_types ("feedback_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each app version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the app */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version (e.g., new features, bug fixes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_versions" (
  "review_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review version entry */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_versions_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES app_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_languages" (
  "review_language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review language entry */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_languages_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_languages_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the user has enabled notifications */,
  "language_preference" TEXT /* Preferred language for the user */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  "email_notifications" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user wants to receive email notifications */,
  "in_app_notifications" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user wants to receive in-app notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the review status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the review status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_status_log" (
  "status_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status log entry */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new status */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who changed the status */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the status was changed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_status_log_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES review_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_status_log_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_status_log_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
